title: Public opinion workflow scope
content: The transformed project is an enterprise public-opinion and brand-risk monitoring agent. It separates external public signals from internal RAG evidence and uses explicit agents for news, social sentiment, internal knowledge, fact verification, compliance risk, and PR strategy.

title: Social media data architecture
content: Social media evidence collection uses a social_media_skill orchestration layer over social_media_mcp low-level primitives. Agents should prefer social_media_collect_evidence for decision-ready social evidence rather than calling every low-level fetch, normalize, dedupe, and save tool manually.

title: RAG and memory separation
content: Public-opinion RAG knowledge must live under data/knowledge/public_opinion. Public-opinion memory must live under data/memory/public_opinion. These sources should not be mixed with old generic RAG test data or unrelated project memory.
